title: Payena thorelii
taxonomy: Payena thorelii is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Sapotaceae. It belongs to the genus Payena, which is a group of plants native to tropical Asia. The species is further classified as Payena thorelii, with several synonyms, including Pouteria thorelii and Payena thorelii var. thorelii. The classification of Payena thorelii is based on its morphology and molecular characteristics. This classification helps in understanding the evolutionary relationships and diversity within the Sapotaceae family.
